# Any change to any file requires approval from the Tech Lead.
#
# Single catch-all is intentional: this is a solo-maintainer template and
# the `main` ruleset enforces `require_code_owner_review`. Path-specific
# ownership (e.g. `apps/backend/ @backend-team`) should be added only when
# a second reviewer joins — otherwise it's cosmetic splitting that doesn't
# change the approval requirement.
*       @victorvinci
